programme.title: Can You Feel the Beat: The Lisa Lisa Story
programme.desc: Singer Lisa Lisa overcomes racism, sexism and breast cancer to climb the Billboard charts.

programme.title: I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Singer Gloria Gaynor rises to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit "I Will Survive."

programme.title: Keyshia Cole: This Is My Story
programme.desc: Young Keyshia Cole overcomes a difficult childhood to pursue her dream of becoming a singer.

programme.title: 5 Guys a Week
programme.desc: Samantha, a 53-year-old, is ready for love again after a devastating relationship.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they try to save their relationship.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Real Love
programme.desc: First-year college student Kendra finds herself falling hard for Ben, her photo class partner.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Strength of a Woman
programme.desc: A photographer finds herself in a failing marriage and must reckon with the decisions she made.

programme.title: 5 Guys a Week
programme.desc: Sophisticated college admissions tutor Caroline is looking for her soul mate.

programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they try to save their relationship.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Forever
programme.desc: A veteran falls head over heels for a local policewoman who has three teenage daughters.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted by Love
programme.desc: A chef makes an unexpected yet passionate connection with a man who's 20 years younger than her.

programme.title: I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Singer Gloria Gaynor rises to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit "I Will Survive."

programme.title: 5 Guys a Week
programme.desc: Authentic and unfiltered, 51-year-old Betsy is looking to bring romance back into her life.
